mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To revolutionize English learning through cutting-edge AI technology, interactive experiences, and personalized instruction that makes language acquisition fun, effective, and accessible to everyone.

techInnovations.title: 🚀 Tech Innovations
techInnovations.description: Cutting-edge technology that makes learning English more effective and engaging than ever before.

courses.title: 📚 Our Courses

courses.intermediateDesc: Build on your foundation with more complex topics

about.heroDesc: We were founded in 2025 and learning English should be fun, engaging, and accessible to everyone and above all complete.
about.ourStoryDesc: We were founded in 2025 and learning English should be fun, engaging, and accessible to everyone and above all complete.
about.ourMissionDesc1: To revolutionize English learning through cutting-edge AI technology, gamified experiences, and personalized instruction that makes language acquisition fun, effective, and accessible to everyone.
about.ourMissionDesc2: Our platform aims to help learners from many countries improve their English skills and achieve their goals.
about.localImpactDesc: We're committed to making a positive impact in our local community and beyond. Through partnerships with schools, community centers, and non-profit organizations, we provide free English education to underserved populations.
about.meetTeamDesc: Our diverse team of educators, technologists, and innovators is dedicated to transforming English learning.
about.teachingTeamDesc: Native English speakers and certified teachers from around the world
about.teachingTeamItem2: Native speakers from English speaking countries USA
about.techTeamDesc: Innovative developers creating the next generation of learning technology
about.valuesDesc: The principles that guide everything we do at Englishfully.
about.innovateDesc: We constantly push the boundaries of what's possible in language learning through cutting-edge technology.
about.accessibleDesc: Quality English education should be accessible to everyone, regardless of their background or location.
about.completeDesc: We provide a comprehensive English learning experience that covers all aspects of language acquisition.
about.funDesc: Learning should be enjoyable! We make English learning fun through gamification and engaging content.

rdTechnology.heroDesc: Explore our cutting-edge AI technology, research methodology, and innovation roadmap. Learn how we're revolutionizing English learning through advanced technology.
rdTechnology.aiModelsDesc: EnglishFully is built on a modular AI architecture designed for speech, conversation, and adaptive learning for non-native English learners, with a focus on Thai language backgrounds.
rdTechnology.speechDesc: AI models designed for detailed pronunciation assessment and corrective feedback.
rdTechnology.speechItem2: Thai-accent English error detection and phoneme analysis
rdTechnology.speechItem3: Real-time pronunciation feedback for guided practice
rdTechnology.languageDesc: Natural language models supporting conversational practice and content generation.
rdTechnology.languageItem1: Context-aware dialogue generation for AI Chat Simulator
rdTechnology.languageItem2: Grammar and usage analysis for learner responses
rdTechnology.languageItem3: Narrative text generation for story-based learning
rdTechnology.languageItem4: Controlled output tuning for educational accuracy
rdTechnology.languageApplied: Applied in: AI Chat Simulator · AI Lesson Hub
rdTechnology.personalizationDesc: Machine learning systems that adapt learning paths to individual users.
rdTechnology.personalizationItem1: Learner profiling based on performance and behavior
rdTechnology.personalizationItem4: Continuous optimization based on learning outcomes
rdTechnology.analyticsDesc: Data systems that monitor progress and inform learning decisions.
rdTechnology.analyticsItem1: Speaking, listening, and interaction progress tracking
rdTechnology.methodologyDesc: Our research-driven approach combines pedagogical best practices with cutting-edge technology to create effective learning solutions.
rdTechnology.pedagogicalDesc: Evidence-based teaching methods integrated into our platform
rdTechnology.dataDrivenDesc: Continuous improvement through user data analysis
rdTechnology.roadmapDesc: Applied R&D roadmap for AI-powered English learning, focused on Thai learners
rdTechnology.q1Desc: Development of advanced speech analysis systems for accurate pronunciation coaching.
rdTechnology.q1Item1: AI Language Tutor with real-time pronunciation feedback
rdTechnology.q1Item3: Thai-accent English detection and error classification
rdTechnology.q2Title: 2025 Q2 – Smart Lesson & AI Video Generation
rdTechnology.q2Desc: Automation of lesson creation using learner performance data and CEFR alignment.
rdTechnology.q2Item1: AI Lesson Hub with adaptive lesson sequencing
rdTechnology.q2Item3: Quality control framework for AI-generated learning content
rdTechnology.q2Supports: Supports: AI Lesson Hub · AI Video Learning
rdTechnology.q3Desc: Expansion into contextual, scenario-based language learning environments.
rdTechnology.q3Item1: AI Chat Simulator for real-world conversation practice
rdTechnology.q3Item2: Branching story logic for interactive learning
rdTechnology.q3Item3: Adaptive difficulty based on learner interaction patterns
rdTechnology.q4Desc: Integration of all learning data into a unified personalization engine.
rdTechnology.q4Item3: Personalized content recommendations across voice, chat, story, and video
rdTechnology.realtimeDesc: Designed for uninterrupted learning flow and immediate correction.
rdTechnology.realtimeItem2: Conversational pacing suitable for live practice
rdTechnology.languageAwareDesc: Instruction designed around the learner's native language background.
rdTechnology.languageAwareItem1: Thai–English pronunciation and grammar interference awareness
rdTechnology.languageAwareItem2: Error correction based on cross-linguistic patterns
rdTechnology.languageAwareItem3: Contextually and culturally appropriate learning examples
rdTechnology.mobileFirstDesc: Built for real-world mobile usage in Thailand and similar markets.
rdTechnology.mobileFirstItem1: Efficient data usage and lightweight interactions
rdTechnology.privacyDesc: Learner data handled responsibly throughout the system.
rdTechnology.privacyItem1: Secure storage and transmission of learning data
rdTechnology.privacyItem3: Alignment with international data protection principles

contact.heroDesc: Get in touch with our team for support, inquiries, or feedback. We're here to help you succeed!
contact.getInTouchDesc: Multiple ways to reach us. Choose the method that works best for you!
contact.sendMessageDesc: Have a question, suggestion, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you!
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
contact.teacherPlaceholder: Your teaching background, qualifications, and why you want to join us...
contact.faqDesc: Quick answers to common questions. Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us!
contact.faq1Answer: Simply sign up for a free account, take our placement test, and start with our beginner courses. Our AI will create a personalized learning path for you!
contact.faq2Answer: We offer a free plan with basic features, premium plans starting at $19.99/month, and pro plans with personal tutoring for $49.99/month.
contact.faq3Question: 📱 Do you have a mobile app?
contact.faq3Answer: Yes! Our mobile app is available for both iOS and Android. Download it from the App Store or Google Play Store.
contact.faq4Answer: Yes! We provide certificates of completion for all our courses and specialized modules. Premium users also get detailed progress reports.
contact.faq5Question: 🤖 How does the AI technology work?
contact.faq5Answer: Our AI analyzes your learning patterns, pronunciation, and progress to provide personalized feedback and adapt lessons to your needs.
contact.faq6Question: 👥 Can I practice with other learners?
contact.faq6Answer: Absolutely! Join our community forum, participate in study groups, and practice with language exchange partners from around the world.
contact.messageSuccess: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.messageFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
contact.applicationSuccess: Application submitted successfully! We'll review your application and get back to you soon.
contact.applicationFailed: Failed to submit application. Please try again.

aiVoiceCoach.heroDesc: Practice real conversations and master English with our advanced AI-powered voice recognition system. Get instant feedback on your speech, pronunciation, accent, and build confidence in real-time.
aiVoiceCoach.featuresDesc: Our AI Language Tutor uses cutting-edge speech recognition technology to provide personalized pronunciation feedback.
aiVoiceCoach.realtimeDesc: Get instant corrections as you speak
aiVoiceCoach.accentDesc: Improve clarity, fluency, and natural delivery
aiVoiceCoach.howItWorksDesc: Our AI creates dynamic, context-aware conversations that adapt to you in real time, analyzing your speech to deliver precise, personalized feedback.
aiVoiceCoach.step1Desc: Start a conversation that matches your learning goals
aiVoiceCoach.step2Desc: Begin speaking with the AI in a natural dialogue
aiVoiceCoach.technologyDesc: Powered by state-of-the-art speech recognition and natural language processing models.
aiVoiceCoach.mlModelsDesc: Our AI uses deep neural networks trained on millions of hours of native English speech to accurately assess pronunciation, intonation, and fluency.
aiVoiceCoach.accuracyDesc: Our system achieves industry-leading accuracy rates in pronunciation assessment and feedback generation.

englishFeed.heroPunch: English learning delivered like social media - addictive, fast, level-adaptive, skill-focused, immersive, and structured.
englishFeed.heroDesc: Built as a swipe-up short-video app—so every lesson stays on track, with zero off-topic content.
englishFeed.heroHighlight1: Vertical lesson feed with synced subtitles and smooth swipe flow
englishFeed.heroHighlight2: Tap-to-learn vocabulary with context, examples, and saved words
englishFeed.heroHighlight3: Built-in AI practice: quiz, pronunciation, tutor role-play, and fun camera image-word matching
englishFeed.heroHighlight4: Level and topic personalization with progress and profile tracking
englishFeed.lessonTypesDesc: Listening, speaking, reading, writing, grammar, and vocabulary—each card shows how you practice it in EnglishFeed. The experience is built on technology that learns, adapts, applies proven teaching methods, and evolves with your progress.
englishFeed.speakingItem1: AI analyzes your speech with corrections in real time
englishFeed.speakingItem2: Role-play with the AI tutor to drill the lesson
englishFeed.speakingItem3: Active learning with pronunciation practice, flashcards, and quizzes
englishFeed.readingItem1: Lessons by level and tags you engage with
englishFeed.readingItem2: Tappable subtitles with guided word support
englishFeed.writingDesc: Improve writing skills with guided exercises
englishFeed.writingItem2: Prompts grounded in the lesson you're watching
englishFeed.writingItem3: AI spelling check and punctuation fixes
englishFeed.vocabularyDesc: Build and retain words that matter
englishFeed.vocabularyItem1: See and hear words in real lesson context
englishFeed.vocabularyItem3: Reinforce with saved lists, quizzes, and flashcard review
englishFeed.grammarDesc: Grammar training with real-time AI feedback
englishFeed.grammarItem1: AI-built practice quizzes and lesson context
englishFeed.grammarItem2: Smart AI feedback on every sentence
englishFeed.howDesc: Built for productive habit learning—familiar feed flow, but structured to keep learners focused, progressing, and coming back daily.
englishFeed.howStep1Desc: A swipe-based lesson flow designed for learning rhythm, not random entertainment.
englishFeed.howStep1Item1: Focus on one lesson each swipe
englishFeed.howStep2Desc: An engaging educational experience in real time
englishFeed.howStep2Item4: Complete one lesson end to end
englishFeed.howStep3Item1: Save words and clip lines fast
englishFeed.howStep3Item4: Build fluency at your own pace
englishFeed.videoDesc: Core lesson tools for focused, in-feed English practice.
englishFeed.subsDesc: When a lesson provides a subtitles JSON URL, the app shows word-level timed text over the video—subtitle-backed listening and reading.
englishFeed.subsItem1: Titles, descriptions, topics, and tags on lessons
englishFeed.subsItem2: Structured content for beginner through advanced
englishFeed.subsItem3: Text timed to what you hear
englishFeed.tapDesc: Opens a rich vocabulary panel for deeper study.
englishFeed.tapItem2: Synonyms, examples, save word, clip sentence
englishFeed.tapItem4: Thai translations where available for local learners
englishFeed.featuresInteractiveSubtitlesDesc: Tap any word to understand it instantly in context.
englishFeed.featuresInteractiveSubtitlesItem1: Instant word meaning and translation support
englishFeed.featuresInteractiveSubtitlesItem2: Pronunciation help with quick audio playback
englishFeed.featuresInteractiveSubtitlesItem4: Save useful words and build vocabulary while watching
englishFeed.toolsDesc: Typical tools available on each lesson in the feed (as implemented).
englishFeed.toolsBullet1: Practice quiz — AI-style multiple choice when available for the lesson
englishFeed.toolsBullet2: Pronunciation — sentence from the lesson; speech recognition and scoring (optional extended feedback)
englishFeed.toolsBullet3: Vocabulary list — lesson cards from the backend with extraction and caching where needed
englishFeed.toolsBullet4: AI tutor — role-play in English grounded in title, description, topic, tags, and subtitle snippet; typing, validation, optional Thai for tutor lines, spelling check, pronunciation, TTS
englishFeed.toolsBullet5: Camera image-word matching — selfie camera with face-aware flashcard placement; timed multiple choice + speak the word; scores and analytics events
englishFeed.toolsBullet6: Like & save — persisted with user id; feeds profile lists and engagement ranking
englishFeed.toolsBullet7: Sound — mute/unmute for the lesson video
englishFeed.toolsBullet8: Info — lesson title, description, tags (tags link to topic pages)
englishFeed.toolsBullet9: Deep links — open a specific video (and optional seek) via URL for sharing and marketing
englishFeed.profileDesc: Your hub for saved work and review.
englishFeed.profileItem1: Account summary; links to vocabulary, sentence clips, flashcard review, liked and saved videos; sign out
englishFeed.profileItem2: Tag pages (/tag/[tag]) to explore lessons by tag
englishFeed.profileItem3: Inbox and bottom-nav Upload marked coming soon where applicable
englishFeed.profileItem4: /tutor redirects to home — tutoring lives on the video, not a standalone page
englishFeed.progressDesc: Stats from locally saved vocabulary: saved, reviewed, known vs difficult, and top difficult words—supporting retention and outcomes.
englishFeed.diffTitle: Why this works better than open social apps
englishFeed.diffDesc: You get the familiar scrolling behavior, but every screen is intentionally built for language learning outcomes.
englishFeed.diffItem1: Learn from real video in context—not isolated word lists
englishFeed.diffItem3: Quiz, pronunciation, vocabulary sheet, AI role-play, and fun camera image-word matching reinforce the same lesson
englishFeed.diffItem4: Saves, likes, clips, review, and personalized ordering support habit formation
englishFeed.diffItem5: Thai-friendly layer where translations are surfaced—relevant for Thailand and bilingual study
englishFeed.diffItem6: Familiar feed interaction without the random non-learning videos that break focus on open social platforms
englishFeed.reviewersDesc: Summary for education, innovation, and differentiation narratives (e.g. BOI / Smart Visa context).
englishFeed.reviewersItem1: Clear educational purpose: structured levels; lessons with metadata; subtitle-backed listening/reading aligned to speech
englishFeed.reviewersItem2: Active learning: word-level subtitles, quizzes, pronunciation, AI conversation tied to lesson themes, fun camera image-word matching
englishFeed.reviewersItem3: Pedagogical support for Thai speakers: Thai for tutor lines, practice sentences, and vocabulary UI where exposed
englishFeed.reviewTechDesc: Custom learning flows around EnglishFully’s lesson catalog, APIs, and server-side caching (vocabulary, definitions, translations, flashcard assets) for consistency and scale. Multimodal design: video, touch, microphone, camera, optional face-aware overlay. We emphasize product architecture, lesson design, UX, caching keys, and integrated workflows—not claiming foundation models as proprietary.
englishFeed.trustDesc: Account login is used to save progress, personalize the feed when you’re signed in, and sync likes and vocabulary. Details follow your published privacy policy.
englishFeed.roadmapNote: Roadmap: Inbox and bottom-nav Upload are coming soon where noted in the app.
englishFeed.ctaDesc: Try the app, join a waitlist, or talk to EnglishFully about partnerships and pilots.
englishFeed.videoLessonDesc: Immersive video learning with intelligent features.
englishFeed.videoLessonItem1: AI-powered visuals, natural voice, and interactivity

englishFeed.featureQuizItem2: Mix of grammar, vocabulary, and comprehension

englishFeed.featureQuizItem4: Keeps practice tied to real lesson content

aiVisualPhonics.heroDesc: Learn pronunciation through interactive visual aids. See how sounds are formed with mouth position guides, sound wave visualizations, and phonetic symbols.
aiVisualPhonics.featuresDesc: Master pronunciation through visual representation of sounds, mouth positions, and phonetic patterns.
aiVisualPhonics.mouthDesc: Interactive 3D models showing correct mouth and tongue positions
aiVisualPhonics.soundWaveDesc: See the frequency and amplitude of sounds in real-time
aiVisualPhonics.phoneticDesc: Learn the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) visually
aiVisualPhonics.waveDesc: See the frequency and amplitude of sounds in real-time
aiVisualPhonics.symbolsDesc: Learn the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) visually

aiVisualPhonics.matchingDesc: Match sounds to visual representations and improve your phonetic awareness.

aiVisualPhonics.techDesc: Our Visual Phonics Engine uses cutting-edge technology to create immersive learning experiences.

aiVisualPhonics.visualizationDesc: Interactive 3D models of the human vocal tract help you understand how sounds are produced.
